notes.note: Failed to Revise: Web search shows this exact title is the name of a BMBF-funded research project (DeepHumanVision) and not a published paper. I found the project page and related publications from the project team with different titles (e.g., Gerken et al. / Darcher et al. preprints and other papers by Macke/Mormann), but there is no record of a peer-reviewed journal or conference publication with the provided title. Because no confirmed publication venue for that exact title could be found, classification failed.
